scenario: A local OpenClaw gateway user can load the plugin and call loo_* tools to search, describe, expand, dry-run, inspect cockpit cards, and reason about operating attention from bounded summaries without raw transcript access.
expected_public_safe_evidence: describe and direct-session/query expand profile names
recent session and cockpit inbox card counts
clean card title/objective/summary/nextAction fields plus presentation_cleaned or presentation_low_confidence reason codes when extraction needed cleanup
watcher status, watcher_triggered reason codes, resume request packet expiry, mutates=false, and approval boundary
Codex app-server read-only availability, allowed/forbidden method posture, thread source coverage, and no-turns proof
visible Codex map source coverage, confidence, ambiguity markers, and public-safe session card refs
Codex Desktop coherence state distinguishing cli_visible from desktop_visible, desktop_refresh_required, desktop_restart_required, and unknown proof states
GitHub operating item normalization for issue, PR, statusCheckRollup, and check records without raw bodies or logs
operating-picture source coverage, source authority coverage, current_lane/fresh_signal/low_confidence_downgraded ranking reason codes, and not_configured P1 source states

end-to-end Eva cockpit dogfood evidence tying GitHub check state, recent Codex cards, clean presentation, current-lane ranking, customer/runtime/security priority, source coverage, and P1 not_configured gaps into one public-safe workflow
gateway setupStatus, setupBlockers, and setupGuidance for first-run credential blockers
agent reasoning note based only on safe summaries
pass_criteria: The npm package includes an agent-facing skill/playbook for the canonical staged recall and dry-run workflows.
OpenClaw gateway can discover the plugin or the issue records why the gateway is unavailable.
Agent can search sessions through loo_* read tools and receive source-prefixed refs.
Agent can describe and expand selected refs within a bounded token profile.
Agent can list recent session cards and a deterministic cockpit inbox without a wildcard query.
Agent-facing card summaries and next actions are cleaned deterministic presentation text rather than raw directive fragments, markdown tables, or duplicated Title/Final labels.
Agent can inspect read-only watcher status and generate resume-request packets without live control, GUI mutation, cleanup, or external writes.
Agent can inspect Codex app-server status and thread signals without reading raw turns, enabling remote control, or mutating Codex.
Agent can correlate sanitized visible Codex candidates with indexed session cards while ambiguous title matches stay low confidence.
Agent can classify Codex Desktop coherence without treating CLI/direct/app-server visibility as Desktop-visible collaboration proof.
Agent can normalize public-safe GitHub issue, PR, statusCheckRollup, and check records into digest-ready github_items before summarization.
Agent can distinguish pending, failed, passed, and unknown PR check-state reason codes without reading check logs.
Agent can see current-lane GitHub PR/check signals rank above old low-confidence Codex cards unless customer/runtime/security impact is present.
Agent can run or inspect the Eva operating-picture dogfood scenario as one coherent workflow instead of trusting isolated ranking, check-state, and card-cleanup tests.
Agent can inspect operating-picture cards whose claims cite source refs, confidence, freshness, reason codes, and authority coverage.
Missing P1 source adapters are reported as not_configured instead of summarized.
Unavailable or cache-only authorities degrade to unknown or low confidence instead of being treated as current truth.
Agent can dry-run a control action and reason about the audit id without sending a live action.
Evidence contains public-safe summaries, counts, refs, hashes, setupStatus classifications, and blocker codes only.
fail_criteria: Agent must read raw transcripts to answer the session-management question.
Gateway exposes live mutation without dry-run approval proof.
Evidence captures local DBs, transcript files, screenshots, prompt text, or secrets.
Tool output is too vague for the agent to choose a safe next action.
Card summaries or next actions expose directive syntax, markdown tables, duplicated Title/Final prefixes, or raw transcript-shaped excerpts as user-facing presentation.
Operating-picture output hides missing sources, omits authority coverage, or treats PLAN_STATE prose as current truth.
known_gaps: Fresh OpenClaw profiles need scoped gateway credentials or env-ref onboarding before tool-smoke can call tools; #298 proves that after setup and the protocol-4 backend caller fix, a clean profile can call `loo_doctor` and `loo_search_sessions` through an isolated loopback gateway.

P0 operating-picture tools use LCO/Codex, normalized public-safe GitHub inputs, explicit PLAN_STATE pins, read-only watcher request packets, and a public source-authority profile only; Notion, support-control, Company Brain, Stripe, dashboard/export, and summarizer adapters remain P1.
Visible Codex map joins prove read-only correlation from sanitized title/status metadata only; they do not prove Codex GUI mutation or visible focus/select/continue workflows.

Codex Desktop coherence classification can prove cli_visible, desktop_visible, desktop_refresh_required, desktop_restart_required, or unknown states from supplied public-safe evidence, but it does not itself perform a live direct-protocol action or a Desktop refresh/restart.
This does not prove live Codex control, generic GUI mutation, Claude Code adapter parity, full business truth, stable release, npm latest promotion, or release-grade customer readiness.
next_action: Finish #307/#308 Desktop visibility proof work so agents can distinguish CLI-visible, Desktop-visible, refresh-required, restart-required, and unknown collaboration states without widening live-control or GUI-mutation claims.
proof_boundary: This proves local OpenClaw gateway agent usability for Codex read/search/describe/expand/detail lookup/recommend/dry-run, read-only watcher request packets, read-only app-server status/thread signals, visible-to-indexed session correlation, Codex Desktop coherence classification, P0 cockpit/operating-picture cards, and fresh-profile gateway-ready invocation using public-safe evidence only; it does not prove live control, GUI mutation, Desktop-visible live collaboration, Claude Code adapter parity, full business truth, stable release, npm latest promotion, or enterprise/customer readiness.
